profile.info-text: I am a Fullstack Developer with 3 years of experience in IT. Deeply understands the full lifecycle of web application development, from designing responsive interfaces using Vue.js to building server-side logic using Node.js. Specializes in writing clean, stable code and integrating REST APIs. Passionate about developing in a modern JavaScript ecosystem, demonstrates strong discipline and the ability to quickly adopt new technologies.
